name: plan-design-review
tagline: Interactive design plan review, generating visual mockups and guiding through design principles to improve UI/UX plans.
verdict: This skill provides a comprehensive, interactive design review process with visual mockup generation. It includes detailed design principles, usability laws, and a structured approach to identifying and fixing design gaps. The skill is highly interactive, guiding the user through decisions and feedback loops. However, it contains several instances of direct

highlights.summary: The skill explicitly instructs the agent on how to interpret the skill file, overriding default behavior.
SKILL.md is 1000+ lines, exceeding the recommended 500-line budget.
